stemHtml: For an aeroplane entering ground effect during landing...

options.a: the intensity of the wing tip vortices decreases, leading to more efficient lift generation.
options.b: both lift and total drag decrease, due to the reduction in downwash behind the wing.
options.c: the wing tip vortices maintain their intensity, but both downwash and lift decrease.
options.d: both lift and induced drag increase, due to the reduction in downwash behind the wing.
